sources.location: local parquet snapshot (Nielsen DVH EXCL. HD)
sources.notes: System A reads the committed local Nielsen snapshot at data/raw/nielsen_<cat>_clean_*.parquet and the dedicated forecast service at thesis/data/_07_forecast_service/forecasts.csv. No live RU warehouse needed to run System A; the live warehouse is only required to run the production Prometheus baseline for the SRQ4 comparison.
